ValidationRule.description: (isnew() || ischanged(StageName)) && IsPickVal(Account.SW_Industry__c, "") && $Profile.Name !="System Administrator" && $Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps" && Account.RecordTypeId !="012b0000000cfIJ" && ( $User.Id = Account.Owner.Id )
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ((isnew()&& Probability!= 0.1)|| ischanged(StageName)) && IsPickVal(Account.SW_Industry__c, "") && $Profile.Name !="System Administrator" && $Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps" && Account.RecordTypeId !="012b0000000cfIJ" && ( $User.Id = Account.Owner.Id ) && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Rank_Ranger"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select the SW Industry on the account.
